top_signals.title: Treasury pushes supermarkets to cap food prices
top_signals.summary: Retailers furious at government effort aimed at limiting impact of inflation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Cuba condemns U.S. sanctions, accuses Washington of building ‘fraudulent case’ for military action
top_signals.summary: The comments come after a fresh wave of U.S. sanctions and amid mounting speculation that the U.S. could carry out military strikes against Cuba.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
